title: sperg.world Menu Panoramas
description: Menu panoramas of the sperg.world spawn
body:
Menu panorama of the sperg.world spawn, the server of the Minecraft youtuber Gerg_

This should work on any Minecraft version that supports custom menu panoramas. Currently, I only have panoramas of the server spawn during the day, without shaders. I have plans to add menu panorama for other server locations too, like the farming district. 

-Made by TheWiseOcelot
